block.vampiresdelight.light_blue_orchid_: Orchid Cake with Light Blue Candle
block.vampiresdelight.light_gray_orchid_: Orchid Cake with Light Gray Candle
effect.vampiresdelight.blessing.descript: Protects from evil spirits such as phantoms.
effect.vampiresdelight.clothes_dissolvin: Dissolves clothes worn by player or mob.
effect.vampiresdelight.fog_vision.descri: Allows to see farther in vampire fog.
enchantment.vampiresdelight.vampire_bite: Heals the player proportionally to the amount of damage dealt.
vampiresdelight.advancement.consume_disg: Eat any disgusting food not intended for your race.
vampiresdelight.advancement.get_clothes_: The Best Present for Any Man
Obtain a potion that dissolves clothes and learn the sense of life. Don't ask me how to get it, ask an elf.
vampiresdelight.advancement.get_garlic.d: Find Garlic in the wild or at hunter trainer's house.
vampiresdelight.advancement.get_human_ey: Scavenge a Human Eye from any human-like creature such as Villager and Vampire Hunter using Knife.
vampiresdelight.advancement.get_orchid_t: Tea with the taste of jalapeno
Brew some Orchid Tea. It can infect with Sanguinare if drunk by a human. Can be a little spicy.
vampiresdelight.advancement.get_vampire_: Find a Vampire Orchid in a Vampire Forest or buy it from Wandering Trader.
vampiresdelight.advancement.get_weathere: Find a Weathered Letter in a dungeon or a structure related to the mod.
vampiresdelight.advancement.place_blood_: Place a Blood Wine Bottle on a Wine Shelf.
vampiresdelight.advancement.place_dandel: Place a Dandelion Beer Bottle on a Wine Shelf. That's legit by the way.
vampiresdelight.advancement.plant_vampir: Plant Vampire Orchid Seeds on Cursed or Bloody Soil Farmland.
vampiresdelight.advancement.pour_blood_w: Blood Wine Tastes the Same as I Remember
Pour blood wine into a glass bottle using your two hands without a Crafting Table.
vampiresdelight.advancement.pour_dandeli: I knew you fharkin' elves had no honour! No respect! No BEER!
Pour dandelion beer into a glass bottle using your two hands without a Crafting Table.
vampiresdelight.advancement.root.desc: The haute cuisine of the vampire kind awaits you!

hat color (hex) should be used for hunter food tooltips as the end color? (The shade it ends with)
vampiresdelight.configuration.hunterTool: Should hunter food tooltips and tooltip's color be shown to all fractions? (Only shown to vampires by default)
vampiresdelight.configuration.overrideFo: §eOverride food properties of items for factions

Should this mod override the food values of all vanilla and modded items to use faction-specific properties? Enabling this option makes components from this mod usable for any item. For instance, if an item has the `vampiresdelight:vampire_food` data component, it will use the food value from the component instead of the default one for vampires. Disable this if it causes conflicts with other mods.

Should the Weird Jelly Sunscreen effect be replaced with Jump Boost?
vampiresdelight.configuration.spiritLant: How much should the Spirit Lantern multiply the visibility in fog? Set to 0.0 if you want to disable it at all. The multiplier is not multiplied by the value, but added to it. So if the value is 0.4, 40% will be added to the distance.

vampiresdelight.jei.info.black_mushroom: Black mushrooms can be rarely found in vampire forests.\n\nBone Meal can be used to grow a huge variant.
vampiresdelight.jei.info.human_eye: Disgusting looking ingredient for vampire food.\n\nObtained by cutting up villagers, pillagers, hunters, and some other human-like races.
vampiresdelight.jei.info.wild_garlic: Garlic can be commonly found as a wild plant in temperate lands, such as plains and forests.
vampiresdelight.text.planted_on_vampire_: Must be planted on Cursed or Bloody Soil Farmland

vampiresdelight.tooltip.pourable_drink_i: To pour the drink from this bottle into a glass, hold the bottle with one hand and the Glass Bottle with the other. Then press and hold the left mouse button

weathered_letter.vampiresdelight.borscht:
Borscht, good borscht is always delicious! Actually, the recipe is simple - fresh meat, sweet vegetables. First, we cook broth on pork or veal meat on the bone. Then we wash and chop beetroot, carrots, and onions. In the meantime, we prepare the roast: pour oil into a heated frying pan, add onions, garlic and carrots. As soon as the onion turns golden, add the beetroot. Fry this for 5 minutes, then put tomato paste and fry for another 5 minutes. Take the meat out of the broth, put the cut cabbage, and a little later - potatoes. Separate the meat from the bone and return it to the borscht, salt it and add the roast. Fresh meat, sweet vegetables! Here it is, the real borscht! I believe many people have forgotten how delicious it can be! Cook and enjoy hunter borscht. Fresh meat, sweet vegetables!

PS: Don't forget the sour cream!
weathered_letter.vampiresdelight.dear_ma:
Dear Marcus G.,

I am writing to inform you of the latest discoveries we have made in your absence. It seems that, despite our misgivings, the injection of properly purified vampire blood does indeed produce favorable results.

Unfortunately, despite all our precautions, one of our volunteers got infected with Sanguinare. However, we re-injected him with garlic and the disease has passed. Apparently, the effect was not as strong as a vampire bite, for example, so a very small dose was enough. We made sure no one else was hurt, and thank God there were no more infections or injuries. I hope this will continue to be the case.

Moving on to the main topic, we were about to ask for your permission, as the head of the researchers, to stop the experiments, but then two men showed unprecedented effects after being injected. One of them has significantly improved vision in the dark, while the other one now has the ability to breathe underwater. We're not sure yet if they've acquired these quirks permanently or if they'll go away at some point, but I think it's already promising. If we continue our experiments, perhaps the community of hunters will be able to gain access to some of the Great Gifts, and that’s worth a lot. This is probably a pretty good way to achieve this. There is some truth to your hypothesis, Grid, although we didn’t take it seriously at first. Please return to headquarters as quickly as possible, we need your assistance.

Yours sincerely,
Ostap H.
weathered_letter.vampiresdelight.unknown: How did you get this? No, really, if you're in survival mode, please report that to the developer. This letter is broken, if you wonder.
